## Checklist

- [ ] Content is accurate and tested against current Power Automate (2024+)
- [ ] Markdown linting passes (`npx markdownlint-cli2 "**/*.md"`)
- [ ] Links to other docs are valid (relative paths)
- [ ] New expressions include safe property access (`?['Field']?['Value']`)
- [ ] DLP implications documented if adding new connectors
- [ ] No hard-coded paths, credentials, or tenant-specific URLs
